title: AI Bots Top the S&P 500: Tickeron Posts 80% in Industrials & Infrastructure
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
Key Takeaways

* [AI trading bots](https://tickeron.com/app/ai-robots/virtualagents/all/) posted **roughly 79%–80% returns** in **Industrials & Infrastructure** strategies.
* Results **meaningfully outperformed the S&P 500** over the same timeframe.
* New **5-minute and 15-minute AI Agents** are built to respond faster to volatility.
* The **Presidents’ Day Sale** features **up to 75% off** AI tools and trading robots.

https://preview.redd.it/v7rxc13u93kg1.png?width=1133&format=png&auto=webp&s=71831bbbaaae7748f0057027026b8f71489091ff

# AI Performance Snapshot: Industrials & Infrastructure

[Tickeron](https://tickeron.com/) reported strong performance from its AI-powered trading bots in the Industrials & Infrastructure space, with the top strategies delivering returns close to **80%**. The sector has been supported by infrastructure-related spending, steady industrial demand, and increased investor interest in construction, equipment, and utility-adjacent names.

Recent highlights include:

* **Infrastructure ETN AI Agent (15-min):** Annualized Return **+79.06%**, win rate **73.18%**
* **Infrastructure PWR AI Agent (15-min):** Annualized Return **+71.68%**, win rate **74.10%**
* **Infrastructure HUBB AI Agent (5-min):** Annualized Return **+57.62%**, win rate **77.20%**
* **CAT AI Agent (60-min):** Annualized Return **+36.91%**, win rate **64.81%**

These outcomes illustrate how AI-driven technical analysis can target short-term and intraday setups in capital-heavy industries.

# Market Backdrop: What’s Driving Industrials

Industrials are trading within a macro environment influenced by lingering inflation concerns, shifting interest-rate expectations, and ongoing infrastructure project pipelines. In that setting, industrials and infrastructure stocks often attract attention from investors looking for real-asset exposure and more visible earnings profiles during uncertainty.

Tickeron says its bots adapt in real time to changing volatility, volume spikes, and trend transitions—areas where slower, rules-based approaches can struggle.

# Faster AI, More Responsive Execution

After expanding its computing resources, Tickeron launched new **15-minute** and **5-minute** AI Agents. Upgraded **Financial Learning Models (FLMs)** are designed to train faster and adjust more quickly to market changes, supporting higher trading cadence while maintaining risk controls.

CEO **Sergey Savastiouk** noted that FLMs blend AI with advanced technical analysis to improve pattern recognition and signal timing. The platform also emphasizes transparency, offering real-time signals across beginner-friendly options and liquid-stock agents built for active markets.

  
Explore **Trending Robots** at: [https://tickeron.com/bot-trading/trending-robots/](https://tickeron.com/bot-trading/trending-robots/)
